D510          ;FROM INTS
D510
D510 CD33D5   KEYRD2:      CALL KINTER     ;SCAN KEYBD, PLACE CHAR IN BUFFER IF THERE IS ONE.
D513 2A955C                LD HL,(KBQP)    ;L=KEY BUFFER QUEUE END (POSN TO PLACE CHAR AT)
D516                                       ;H=QUEUE HEAD (PTS TO NEXT CHAR TO BE READ)
D516                                       ;BOTH ARE DISPLACEMENTS FROM KBQB (BUFFER START)
D516                                       ;IF H=L, BUFFER IS EMPTY.
D516 7C                    LD A,H
D517 BD                    CP L
D518 C8                    RET Z           ;RET IF NO CHARS IN BUFFER
D519
D519 213B5C                LD HL,FLAGS
D51C CB6E                  BIT 5,(HL)
D51E C0                    RET NZ          ;RET IF LAST KEY NOT READ YET (KEY AVAILABLE)
D51F
D51F CBEE                  SET 5,(HL)      ;'KEY PRESSED'
D521 6F                    LD L,A
D522 2600                  LD H,0
D524 3C                    INC A
D525 E607                  AND 07H
D527 32965C                LD (KBQP+1),A   ;NEW HEAD POSN REFLECTS CHAR TRANSFER TO COME
D52A 118D5C                LD DE,KBQB
D52D 19                    ADD HL,DE       ;PT TO HEAD
D52E 7E                    LD A,(HL)
D52F 32085C                LD (LASTK),A    ;TRANSFER TO LASTK
D532 C9                    RET
D533
D533 CDBCD5   KINTER:      CALL KEYSCAN
D536 3E00                  LD A,0
D538 2055                  JR NZ,LDLH      ;JR IF NO KEY PRESSED
D53A                                       ;(NLASTH=0 IF NO KEY OR JUST A SHIFT KEY. USED BY
D53A                                       ;AUTO-REPEAT)
D53A 21565C                LD HL,NLASTH
D53D 7B                    LD A,E          ;UNSHIFTED KEY CODE
D53E BE                    CP (HL)
D53F 280A                  JR Z,KBCR       ;JR IF SAME KEY AS LAST TIME
D541
D541 23                    INC HL
D542 BE                    CP (HL)
D543 2806                  JR Z,KBCR       ;OR TIME BEFORE
D545
D545 FE41                  CP 65           ;CODE FOR ENTER KEY - PRONE TO STUTTER
D547 2002                  JR NZ,KBCR
D549
D549 23                    INC HL          ;EXTRA CHECK FOR ENTER KEY ONLY
D54A BE                    CP (HL)         ;TIME-BEFORE-TIME BEFORE
D54B
D54B F5       KBCR:        PUSH AF
D54C CD9AD5                CALL KYVL       ;GET A=CHAR, USING D AND E
D54F 4F                    LD C,A
D550 21055C                LD HL,REPCT
D553 F1                    POP AF
D554 201F                  JR NZ,KBDI      ;JR IF NOT SAME KEY AS LAST TIME, OR TIME BEFORE
D556
D556 35                    DEC (HL)
D557 C0                    RET NZ          ;RET IF NOT TIME TO REPEAT KEY
D558
D558 E5                    PUSH HL         ;ELSE CHECK IT IS STILL HELD DOWN (NOT SOME OTHER
D559 11F65B                LD DE,KBUFF+8   ;KEY)
D55C 2A035C                LD HL,(LKPB)
D55F 7C                    LD A,H          ;A=1 FOR PORT FE, 9 FOR FF
D560 83                    ADD A,E
D561 5F                    LD E,A
D562 1A                    LD A,(DE)       ;A=BYTE FOR DESIRED PORT FROM KBUFF BIT MAP
D563                                       ;'CURRENT' DATA
D563                                       ;L=1 FOR BIT 7, 8 FOR BIT 0
D563 07       KBXL:        RLCA
D564 2D                    DEC L
D565 20FC                  JR NZ,KBXL      ;GET DESIRED KEY BIT TO CARRY
D567
D567 E1                    POP HL
D568 D8                    RET C           ;NO AUTO-REPEAT IF KEY NO LONGER HELD DOWN
D569
D569 34                    INC (HL)
D56A 3A3B5C                LD A,(FLAGS)
D56D E620                  AND 20H
D56F C0                    RET NZ          ;RET IF STILL KEYS IN BUFFER (DO NOT ACCUMULATE
D570                                       ;AUTO-REPEATING KEYS)
D570
D570 3A0A5C                LD A,(REPPER)   ;RELOAD REPCT FROM REPPER (DELAY BETWEEN REPEATS)
D573 1803                  JR KBRK
D575
D575 3A095C   KBDI:        LD A,(REPDEL)
D578
D578 77       KBRK:        LD (HL),A       ;NEW KEY - SET UP REPCT FOR INITIAL DELAY BEFORE
D579                                       ;AUTO-REPEAT
D579
D579 2A955C                LD HL,(KBQP)    ;L=KEY BUFFER QUEUE END (POSN TO PLACE CHAR AT)
D57C                                       ;H=QUEUE HEAD (PTS TO NEXT CHAR TO BE READ)
D57C                                       ;BOTH ARE DISPLACEMENTS FROM KBQB (BUFFER START)
D57C                                       ;IF H=L, BUFFER IS EMPTY. IF *NEW* POSN OF H=L,
D57C                                       ;BUFFER IS FULL
D57C 7D                    LD A,L
D57D 3C                    INC A
D57E E607                  AND 07H
D580 BC                    CP H
D581 C8                    RET Z           ;RET IF BUFFER FULL (WRAPPED SO END=HEAD)

D582 32955C                LD (KBQP),A
D585 2600                  LD H,0
D587 118D5C                LD DE,KBQB
D58A 19                    ADD HL,DE       ;PT TO END
D58B 71                  LD (HL),C          ;PLACE CHAR IN BUFFER
D58C 3A065C              LD A,(LASTKV)
D58F
D58F 21565C   LDLH:      LD HL,NLASTH
D592 4E                  LD C,(HL)
D593 77                  LD (HL),A
D594 23                  INC HL
D595 46                  LD B,(HL)
D596 71                  LD (HL),C
D597 23                  INC HL
D598 70                  LD (HL),B
D599 C9                  RET
D59A
D59A          ;GET KEY CODE FROM MAP USING E AND D (SHIFT)
D59A
D59A 2AD85B   KYVL:      LD HL,(KBTAB)
D59D 7A                  LD A,D             ;00 IF NO SHIFT, OR 1/2/3 FOR CAPS/SYM/CNTRL
D59E 1600                LD D,0
D5A0 19                  ADD HL,DE
D5A1 A7                  AND A
D5A2 2806                JR Z,KINT4        ;JR IF NO SHIFT USED
D5A4
D5A4 1E46                LD E,70
D5A6

D5A7 3D                  DEC A
D5A8 20FC                JR NZ,KYVLP

D5AA 3A6A5C   KINT4:     LD A,(FLAGS2)
D5AD E608                AND 08H            ;Z=CAPS LOCK OFF
D5AF 7E                  LD A,(HL)
D5B0 C8                  RET Z
D5B1
D5B1 CD1E3B              CALL ALPHA
D5B4 D0                  RET NC             ;RET IF NOT A LETTER
D5B5
D5B5 E6DF                AND 0DFH           ;FORCE LOWER CASE LETTERS TO UPPER CASE
D5B7 C9                  RET
D5B8
D5B8          ;KEYSCAN.
D5B8          ;ACTION: LOOK FOR CHANGED BITS IN KEYBOARD STATE SINCE LAST SCAN, SO THAT
D5B8          ;SEVERAL KEYS CAN BE PRESSED DOWN AND A NEW KEY WILL STILL BE NOTICED. IGNORE
D5B8          ;KEY RELEASES. IF THERE HAVE BEEN NO NEW PRESSES, RETURN THE SAME KEYSCAN
D5B8          ;CODES AS LAST TIME, UNLESS ALL KEYS ARE RELEASED - THEN RETURN NULL CODE.
D5B8
D5B8          ;ENTRY: NO CONDITIONS
D5B8          ;EXIT: IF NZ, NO KEY PRESSED AND DE=FFFF
D5B8          ;      IF Z, E=KEY VALUE
D5B8          ;            IF D=0, NO SHIFT, ELSE D=1 (CAPS SH.) 2 (SYM. SH.) OR 3 (CONTROL)
D5B8
D5B8          ;ENTER AT KEYSCAN+3 WITH HL=DIFFERENT 18-BYTE KBUFF IF DESIRED
D5B8
D5B8          ;USED BY INKEY$ - 2 SCANS IN CASE OF INTERRUPT
D5B8
D5B8 CDBCD5   TWOKSC:    CALL KEYSCAN
D5BB C8                  RET Z
D5BC
D5BC 21EE5B   KEYSCAN:   LD HL,KBUFF       ;18-BYTE STORE
D5BF E5                  PUSH HL
D5C0 01FEFE              LD BC,0FE00H+KEYPORT
D5C3                                       ;C HAS PORT FOR BITS 4-0, B STARTS
D5C3                                       ;WITH A8 LOW FOR 1ST KEY ROW
D5C3 16E0                LD D,0E0H         ;MASK TO KEEP BITS 7-5 OF A, USE 4-0 OF E
D5C5
D5C5 ED58     KBSL:      IN E,(C)           ;READ BITS 4-0
D5C7 78                  LD A,B             ;A WILL BE ON HI ADDR LINES DURING PORT READ
D5C8 DBF9                IN A,(STATPORT)    ;READ BITS 7-5
D5CA AB                  XOR E
D5CB A2                  AND D
D5CC AB                  XOR E
D5CD 04                  INC B
D5CE 280B                JR Z,KBEL          ;JR IF WE JUST DID 'SPECIAL' PORT FFFEH
D5D0
D5D0 77                  LD (HL),A
D5D1 05                  DEC B
D5D2 23                  INC HL
D5D3 CB00                RLC B              ;NEXT PORT (FEFE, FDFE, FBFE...7FFE)
D5D5 38EE                JR C,KBSL          ;LOOP UNTIL BACK TO PORT FEFE AGAIN
D5D7
D5D7 06FF                LD B,0FFH
D5D9 18EA                JR KBSL
D5DB
D5DB F6E1     KBEL:      OR 0E1H            ;ONLY BITS 4-0 VALID FOR PORT FFFE, AND FORCE
D5DD 77                  LD (HL),A          ;BIT 0 (CONTROL KEY BIT) HI TOO
D5DE E1                  POP HL             ;KBUFF
D5DF 54                  LD D,H
D5E0 5D                  LD E,L
D5E1 CBC6                SET 0,(HL)         ;'NO CAPS SHIFT' (SCAN SEPARATELY FOR IT)
D5E3 23                  INC HL
D5E4 23                  INC HL
D5E5 23                  INC HL
D5E6 CBEE                SET 5,(HL)         ;'NO ESC'
D5E8 23                  INC HL
D5E9 23                  INC HL
D5EA 23                  INC HL
D5EB 23                  INC HL
D5EC CBCE                SET 1,(HL)         ;'NO SYM. SHIFT' (SCAN SEPARATELY FOR IT)
D5EE 23                  INC HL
D5EF 23                  INC HL             ;PT TO LAST SCAN DATA (BYTES 10-18)
D5F0 0609                LD B,9             ;(HL=KBUFF+9, DE=KBUFF)
D5F2
D5F2 1A       KBCL:      LD A,(DE)          ;THIS SCAN DATA
D5F3 4E                  LD C,(HL)          ;LAST SCAN DATA
D5F4 77                    LD (HL),A         ;LAST SCAN DATA UPDATED WITH NEW DATA - BUT WE
D5F5                                         ;HAVE IT IN C NOW
D5F5 A9                    XOR C
D5F6 2F                    CPL               ;GET ALTERED BITS SINCE LAST SCAN AS 0'S
D5F7 B6                    OR (HL)           ;KEEP AS 0'S IF CHANGE WAS 1->0 (PRESSED)
D5F8 12                    LD (DE),A         ;'CHANGED' DATA TO KBUFF
D5F9 23                    INC HL
D5FA 13                    INC DE
D5FB 10F5                  DJNZ KBCL
D5FD
D5FD 0609                  LD B,9
D5FF
D5FF 1B         KBDL:      DEC DE
D600 1A                    LD A,(DE)
D601 3C                    INC A
D602 2011                  JR NZ,KBYK        ;JR IF ANY BIT RESET
D604
D604 10F9                  DJNZ KBDL
D606
D606            ;NO NEW PRESSES SINCE LAST SCAN. HL=KBUFF+18
D606
D606 0609                  LD B,9
D608 ED5B065C              LD DE,(LASTKV)    ;E=LAST VALUE
D60C
D60C 2B         KBAKL:     DEC HL
D60D 7E                    LD A,(HL)
D60E 3C                    INC A
D60F 202B                  JR NZ,KBSH        ;JR IF KBUFF SHOWS ANY KEY PRESSED APART FROM SHIFT
D611                                         ;USE LAST VALUE, PLUS CURRENT SHIFT STATUS
D611 10F9                  DJNZ KBAKL
D613
D613 04                    INC B             ;NZ
D614 C9                    RET
D615
D615 3D         KBYK:      DEC A
D616 0E09                  LD C,9
D618
D618 0D         KBBL:      DEC C
D619 1F                    RRA
D61A 38FC                  JR C,KBBL         ;CHANGE BIT POSN TO NUMBER IN C (1-8)
D61C
D61C ED43035C              LD (LKPB),BC      ;LAST KEY PORT/BIT SAVED FOR AUTO-REPEAT CHECKING
D620                                         ;B=1 IF LAST PORT = FEFE, 9 IF FFFE. C=8 FOR BIT
D620                                         ;0, 1 FOR BIT 7
D620 79                    LD A,C
D621 87                    ADD A,A           ;*2
D622 87                    ADD A,A           ;*4
D623 87                    ADD A,A           ;*8
D624 81                    ADD A,C           ;*9 (09-48H)
D625 90                    SUB B             ;SUB 1-9 TO GET 00-47H
D626 5F                    LD E,A            ;SCAN CODE TO E
D627 21C45A                LD HL,SOFFCT
D62A AF                    XOR A
D62B 77                    LD (HL),A         ;ZERO SCREEN OFF COUNTER - KEYBOARD USED
D62C 23                    INC HL
D62D 86                    ADD A,(HL)        ;SOFLG
D62E 280C                  JR Z,KBSH         ;JR IF SCREEN NOT TURNED OFF BY NO KEY USE
D630
D630 AF                    XOR A
D631 77                    LD (HL),A         ;'ON'
D632 3A4B5C                LD A,(BORDCOL)
D635 E67F                  AND 7FH
D637 324B5C                LD (BORDCOL),A
D63A D3FE                  OUT (KEYPORT),A
D63C
D63C 01FEFE     KBSH:      LD BC,0FEFEH
D63F ED78                  IN A,(C)
D641 1601                  LD D,1
D643 A2                    AND D
D644 2812                  JR Z,KBLD         ;JR IF CAPS SHIFT - D=1
D646                                         ;ELSE D=1
D646 04                    INC B
D647 ED78                  IN A,(C)
D649 A2                    AND D
D64A 1603                  LD D,3
D64C 280A                  JR Z,KBLD         ;JR IF CONTROL - D=3
D64E
D64E 15                    DEC D
D64F 067F                  LD B,7FH
D651 ED78                  IN A,(C)
D653 A2                    AND D
D654 2802                  JR Z,KBLD         ;JR IF SYM SHIFT - D=2
D656
D656 15                    DEC D
D657 15                    DEC D             ;Z=KEY OBTAINED. D=0 FOR NO SHIFT
D658
D658 ED53065C   KBLD:      LD (LASTKV),DE
D65C C9                    RET
D65D                                               ;KEYRD2
D65D
D65D                       INCLUDE SCRSEL2.SAM     ; GOTO, CONT, GETTOKEN, MODPT2, AUTO
D65D            ;SCRSEL2.SAM.
D65D
D65D 219ED6     GOSUB:     LD HL,GOSUB2
D660 DD                    DB 0DDH           ;"JR+3"
D661
D661 219219     GOTO:      LD HL,GOTO2
D664
D664 E5         GSUBTOC:   PUSH HL
D665 FEDE                  CP 0DEH           ;ONTOK
D667 2808                  JR Z,GOTON
D669
D669 CDE43A                CALL EXPT1NUM     ;LINE NUMBER
D66C E1                   POP HL           ;ADDR OF GOTO OR GOSUB ROUTINE
D66D CD153B               CALL CHKEND
D670
D670 E9                   JP (HL)
D671
D671          ;E.G. GOSUB (OR GOTO) ON X;100,234,400

D674 F5                   PUSH AF
D675 FE3B                 CP ";"
D677 C2290D               JP NZ,NONSENSE
D67A
D67A F1                   POP AF
D67B 3809                 JR C,GOTON2      ;JR IF RUNNING
D67D
D67D E1                   POP HL           ;GOTO/GOSUB ADDR

D681 FE2C                 CP ","
D683 28F9                 JR Z,GOTONSL
D685
D685 C9                   RET              ;TO NEXT STAT
D686
D686 CD651D   GOTON2:     CALL FPTOA       ;GET NUMBER AFTER 'ON' IN C AND A
D689                                       ;CY IF >255
D689 9F                   SBC A,A          ;A=255 IF OUT OF RANGE, ELSE 0
D68A 2801                 JR Z,GOTONRL     ;C IS OK IF A=0
D68C
D68C 4F                   LD C,A           ;ELSE LET C=255
D68D

D68E CDE33A               CALL SEXPT1NUM
D691 C1                   POP BC
D692 0D                   DEC C
D693 C8                   RET Z            ;RET TO GOTO OR GOSUB IF THIS IS DESIRED EXPR
D694
D694 CD121D               CALL FDELETE     ;DISCARD EXPR FROM FPCS
D697 DF                   RST 18H
D698 FE2C                 CP ","
D69A 28F1                 JR Z,GOTONRL     ;LOOP IF THERE ARE MORE LINE NOS TO SKIP
D69C
D69C D1                   POP DE           ;GOTO/GOSUB ADDR
D69D C9                   RET              ;TO NEXT STAT - LINE NOS RAN OUT.
D69E
D69E CD2E1D   GOSUB2:     CALL GETINT
D6A1 7C                   LD A,H
D6A2 3C                   INC A
D6A3 CA391D               JP Z,IOORERR
D6A6
D6A6 0600                 LD B,00H         ;'GOSUB' TYPE
D6A8 E5                   PUSH HL          ;LINE NO.
D6A9 CDF118               CALL BSTKE       ;STACK RETURN ADDR
D6AC E1                   POP HL
D6AD C39A19               JP GOTO3
D6B0
D6B0          ;GET TOKEN SR - VIA JUMP TABLE
D6B0
D6B0 4F       GETTOKEN:   LD C,A
D6B1 08                   EX AF,AF'        ;NO OF WORDS TO CHECK,+1
D6B2
D6B2 23       GTTOK1:     INC HL
D6B3
D6B3 CB7E     GTTOK2:     BIT 7,(HL)
D6B5 28FB                 JR Z,GTTOK1      ;LOOP TILL WE FIND THE END OF A KEYWORD
D6B7                                       ;32 TS PER LOOP
D6B7
D6B7 0D                   DEC C
D6B8 C8                   RET Z            ;RET IF WE HAVE CHECKED THEM ALL - Z=FAILED
D6B9                                       ;DE=FIRST LETTER OF ELINE WORD COPY
D6B9 23                   INC HL
D6BA 1A                   LD A,(DE)
D6BB AE                   XOR (HL)
D6BC E6DF                 AND 0DFH
D6BE 20F3                 JR NZ,GTTOK2     ;LOOP BACK AND CHECK ANOTHER WORD IF MATCH FAILS
D6C0                                       ;ABOUT 80 TS PER LOOP IF NO MATCH. ABOUT 35USEC
D6C0                                       ;PER 5-LETTER WORD OR 5.3MSEC FOR 150 WORDS.
D6C0 D5                   PUSH DE          ;PTR TO FIRST LETTER IN ELINE WORD
D6C1 13                   INC DE
D6C2
D6C2 23       GTTOK3:     INC HL
D6C3 7E                   LD A,(HL)
D6C4 FE20                 CP " "
D6C6 1A                   LD A,(DE)
D6C7 13                   INC DE
D6C8 2004                 JR NZ,GTTOK4     ;JR IF NO EMBEDDED SPACE IN KEYWORD IN LIST
D6CA
D6CA BE                   CP (HL)
D6CB 28F5                 JR Z,GTTOK3      ;ELSE ACCEPT ONE IN INPUT
D6CD
D6CD 23                   INC HL           ;BUT DON'T INSIST - SKIP LIST PTR IF NO SP IN INPUT
D6CE
D6CE AE       GTTOK4:     XOR (HL)
D6CF E6DF                 AND 0DFH
D6D1 28EF                 JR Z,GTTOK3      ;LOOP IF STILL MATCHING OK
D6D3
D6D3 E67F                 AND 7FH
D6D5 2004                 JR NZ,GTTOK5     ;JR IF INPUT AND LIST WORDS DON'T END NOW
D6D7
D6D7 7E                   LD A,(HL)
D6D8 07                   RLCA
D6D9 3803                 JR C,GTTOK6      ;OK IF LIST WORD HAS FINISHED
D6DB
D6DB D1       GTTOK5:     POP DE
D6DC 18D5                JR GTTOK2
D6DE
D6DE FE7E     GTTOK6:    CP 7EH            ;('=' TERMINATOR =7B AFTER RLCA, '>'=7DH, '$'=49H)
D6E0 3F                  CCF               ;NC IF '=' OR '>' OR '$'
D6E1 1A                  LD A,(DE)         ;INPUT CHAR AFTER MATCHED WORD
D6E2 DC373B              CALL C,ALDU       ;CALL TO INSIST ON NON-LETTER AFTER E.G. PRINTx
D6E5                                       ;BUT NOT AFTER <>,>= OR <= OR CHR$a
D6E5 38F4                JR C,GTTOK5       ;('=' AND '>' NEVER CALL ALPHA OR JR HERE)
D6E7
D6E7 E1                  POP HL            ;FIRST LETTER OF ELINE WORD COPY
D6E8 08                  EX AF,AF'
D6E9 91                  SUB C             ;A=1 IF FIRST WORD MATCHES, ETC.
D6EA C9                  RET

D6EB E603     MODPT2:    AND 03H
D6ED 21405A              LD HL,MODE

D6FF 21785A              LD HL,CUSCRNP

D703 A9                  XOR C             ;BUT
D704 E69F                AND 9FH           ;USE BITS 6 AND 5 OF C TO SET MODE
D706 A9                  XOR C

D708 DBFC                IN A,(VIDPORT)
D70A AE                  XOR (HL)
D70B E61F                AND 1FH

D70F                                       ;ALTERING HARDWARE MODE
D70F 7E                  LD A,(HL)
D710 D3FC                OUT (VIDPORT),A
D712
D712 F1       MDL2:      POP AF            ;NEW MODE
D713 C1                  POP BC            ;C=PREV MODE
D714 F5                  PUSH AF           ;NEW MODE
D715 FE01                CP 1              ;CY IF MODE 0
D717 9F                  SBC A,A           ;MODE 0=FF, REST=0
D718 210908              LD HL,0809H       ;CHAR WIDTH/HEIGHT FOR MODES 1-3

D728 203D                JR NZ,ECLS        ;JR IF NOT MODE 2 NOW, AND NOT CHANGING TO MODE 2
D72A

D72A                     ; 0-3, GET BACK NON-MODE-2 COLOURS

D72D 22485A              LD (M23PAPP),HL

D748 CD80F1              CALL M3TO2        ;CONVERT H

D74E 22485A              LD (M23PAPP),HL   ;PREVENTS STRIPED INKS AFTER MODE 2 SET.
D751 2A305A              LD HL,(M23LSC)

D76C

D780                                         ;UPPER SCREEN AND LOWER SCREEN

D997          ;PRINTFP.SAM - PRINT A NUMBER
D997
D997
D997          ;*******************************************************************************
D997          ;RETURN STR$ OF NUMBER ON FPCS AS BC BYTES AT (DE) IN BUFFER
D997
D997 3E06     PFSTRS:    LD A,6
D999
D999 329A5B   PFSTRSC:   LD (FRACLIM),A    ;UP TO 4 LEADING ZEROS IN FRACTIONS BEFORE EFORM
D99C CDC5DA              CALL PRFPBUF      ;IS USED
D99F 3A9D5B              LD A,(DIGITS)
D9A2 A7                  AND A
D9A3 201A                JR NZ,PFNRND      ;JR IF LESS THAN 9 CHARS - RESULT IS EXACT
D9A5                                       ;ELSE ROUND UP ON 9TH. DIGIT. (NOT A DEC. PT)
D9A5 2A9B5B              LD HL,(NPRPOS)
D9A8 2B                  DEC HL
D9A9 229B5B              LD (NPRPOS),HL    ;IGNORE 9TH. DIGIT OTHER THAN FOR ROUNDING
D9AC 7E                  LD A,(HL)
D9AD FE35                CP "5"
D9AF 380E                JR C,PFNRND       ;NO ROUND IF E.G. 12345678.4
D9B1
D9B1 3630     PFRNDLP:   LD (HL),"0"
D9B3
D9B3 2B       PFPSLP:    DEC HL
D9B4 7E                  LD A,(HL)
D9B5 FE2E                CP "."
D9B7 28FA                JR Z,PFPSLP
D9B9
D9B9 3C                  INC A
D9BA FE3A                CP "9"+1
D9BC 30F3                JR NC,PFRNDLP     ;JR IF OVERFLOWED - 0 THIS DIGIT AND KEEP ROUNDING
D9BE                                       ;EXTREME CASE IS ROUND RIGHT BACK TO FIRST ZERO
D9BE                                       ;BEFORE EXITING LOOP
D9BE 77                  LD (HL),A
D9BF
D9BF 2A9B5B   PFNRND:    LD HL,(NPRPOS)
D9C2 11A05B              LD DE,PRNBUFF
D9C5 A7                  AND A
D9C6 ED52                SBC HL,DE
D9C8 4D                  LD C,L
D9C9 44                  LD B,H
D9CA 2D                  DEC L
D9CB C8                  RET Z             ;IF ONLY 1 CHAR, MUST BE ZERO - LEN 1, AT (DE)
D9CC
D9CC 19                  ADD HL,DE
D9CD 23                  INC HL            ;HL=NPRPOS
D9CE 3A9F5B              LD A,(DECPNTED)
D9D1 A7                  AND A
D9D2 2006                JR NZ,MTRZDLP     ;DELETE TRAILING ZEROS IF DEC PT USED E.G. 1.2300
D9D4
D9D4 3A9E5B   EFCHECK:   LD A,(EPOWER)
D9D7 A7                  AND A
D9D8 280D                JR Z,PFNPNT       ;JR IF NOT EFORM - LEAVE TRAILING ZEROS
D9DA
D9DA 0D       MTRZDLP:   DEC C
D9DB 2B                  DEC HL
D9DC 7E                  LD A,(HL)
D9DD FE30                CP "0"
D9DF 28F9                JR Z,MTRZDLP      ;DELETE TRAILING ZEROS
D9E1
D9E1 7E                  LD A,(HL)
D9E2 FE2E                CP "."
D9E4 28EE                JR Z,EFCHECK      ;KEEP "." DELETED AND GOTO PFNPNT IF NOT EFORM
D9E6                                       ;ELSE PNT IS NOT REAL - DELETE MORE ZEROS IF NEEDED
D9E6
D9E6 0C                  INC C             ;ELSE "UNDELETE" LAST NON-"0"/NON-"." CHAR
D9E7
D9E7 1A       PFNPNT:    LD A,(DE)
D9E8 FE2D                 CP "-"
D9EA 2002                 JR NZ,PFNMIN     ;SKIP A FIRST "-" IF NEEDED
D9EC
D9EC 13                   INC DE
D9ED 1A                   LD A,(DE)
D9EE
D9EE FE30     PFNMIN:     CP "0"
D9F0 2020                 JR NZ,PFEXIT      ;JR IF FIRST CHAR USED IN ROUNDING
D9F2                                        ;(=div by 10 if fract: 0998->999 but 0999->1000)
D9F2 3A9E5B               LD A,(EPOWER)
D9F5 3D                   DEC A             ;0->FF
D9F6 FE80                 CP 80H            ;CY IF +VE, NZ EPOWER (FRACTION) (80H NOT CRITICAL)
D9F8 CE01                 ADC A,1           ;A=ORIG IF 0 OR -VE, ELSE A=A+1
D9FA FE08                 CP 8
D9FC 2803                 JR Z,PFNEZ        ;JR IF FRACTION ROUNDED UP TO 1
D9FE
D9FE 329E5B               LD (EPOWER),A     ;CAN PUT IN AN EXTRA LEAD ZERO TO COMP FOR
DA01                                        ;"MISSED" DIV COS FIRST ZERO NOT DELETED.
DA01
DA01 0D       PFNEZ:      DEC C             ;COMPENSATE LEN FOR LEADING ZERO TO BE LOST
DA02 79                   LD A,C
DA03 2A9B5B               LD HL,(NPRPOS)
DA06 2B                   DEC HL
DA07 229B5B               LD (NPRPOS),HL    ;COMPENSATE NPRPOS IN CASE 9-DIGIT INTEGER LOOP
DA0A                                        ;USED (SEE LATER)
DA0A 62                   LD H,D
DA0B 6B                   LD L,E
DA0C 23                   INC HL
DA0D 0E0A                 LD C,10
DA0F EDB0                 LDIR              ;ALIGN TO LHS E.G. 01.23 -> 1.23
DA11 4F                   LD C,A
DA12
DA12 11A05B   PFEXIT:     LD DE,PRNBUFF
DA15 3A9D5B               LD A,(DIGITS)
DA18 219F5B               LD HL,DECPNTED
DA1B B6                   OR (HL)
DA1C 6F                   LD L,A            ;L=0 IF NINE DIGIT INTEGER
DA1D 3A9E5B               LD A,(EPOWER)
DA20 67                   LD H,A
DA21 A7                   AND A
DA22 7D                   LD A,L
DA23 2008                 JR NZ,PFEFORM     ;JR IF EFORM (FRACTIONS ARE ALWAYS NOMINALLY EFORM)
DA25
DA25          ;NOW CHECK FOR 9-DIGIT INTEGERS WHICH SHOULD BE EFORM TOO

DA25 A7                   AND A
DA26 C0                   RET NZ            ;RET IF NOT 9 DIGIT INTEGER
DA27
DA27 3D                   DEC A
DA28 329E5B               LD (EPOWER),A     ;POWER FF IS CORRECT FOR E+8
DA2B 1892                 JR PFNRND         ;PRINT EFORMAT NUMBER
DA2D
DA2D A7       PFEFORM:    AND A
DA2E 2801                 JR Z,PFPOWOK      ;IF A 9-DIGIT INTEGER WAS PRODUCED
DA30                                        ;BY MULTIPLYING BY A POWER - JUMP. IF NOT, FORM
DA30                                        ;IS EG 12345678.9 OR 12345678, BECAUSE POWER
DA30                                        ;CHOSEN WAS TOO -VE (IN THE CASE OF BIG NUMBERS)
DA30                                        ;OR TOO SMALL (IN THE CASE OF SMALL NUMBERS)
DA30                                        ;IN WHICH CASE RESULT IS EFFECTIVELY 0.XE+/-H
DA30 24                   INC H             ;CHANGE TO X.XE+/-H
DA31
DA31 3A9A5B   PFPOWOK:    LD A,(FRACLIM)    ;NORMALLY 6, TO ALLOW UP TO 4 LEADING ZEROS
DA34 6F                   LD L,A
DA35 7C                   LD A,H
DA36 D608                 SUB 8
DA38 283A                 JR Z,PFSPBH       ;JR IF ROUNDING MEANS *NO* LEADING ZEROS
DA3A                                        ;(0.999999->1)
DA3A BD                   CP L
DA3B 3845                 JR C,PFFRACT      ;JR WITH 1 FOR 0.1, 2 FOR 0.01,... 5 FOR 0.00001
DA3D
DA3D CB7C                 BIT 7,H
DA3F 2801                 JR Z,NEGEFORM

DA41 2F                   CPL
DA42

DAA3 11A05B   PFSETPRB:   LD DE,PRNBUFF      ;BC=LEN
DAA6 C9                   RET
DAA7
DAA7          ;ENTRY:    A=SPACE TO OPEN AFTER ANY MINUS SIGN IN PRNBUFF. (1-19D BYTES)
DAA7          ;EXIT: HL=BEFORE SPACE. BC SAVED

DAA7 C5       PFSPACE:    PUSH BC
DAA8 26FF                 LD H,0FFH
DAAA ED44                 NEG

DAAE 011500               LD BC,21           ;BUFF LEN (ACTUALLY, OVERLAPS BCD BUFF, BUT OK)
DAB1 09                   ADD HL,BC          ;MAX TO MOVE IS 15; LESS IF BIGGER GAP WANTED
DAB2                                         ;MIN IS 1
DAB2 44                   LD B,H
DAB3 4D                   LD C,L
DAB4 E1                   POP HL

DAB8 FE2D                 CP "-"
DABA 2001                 JR NZ,PFSKMIN

DABC 0D                   DEC C              ;1 LESS IF LEADING MINUS - LEAVE IT ALONE
DABD
DABD 11B45B   PFSKMIN:    LD DE,PRNBUFF+20   ;DEST=END OF BUFFER
DAC0 19                   ADD HL,DE          ;SRC IS SOME BYTES BEFORE
DAC1 EDB8                 LDDR
DAC3 C1                   POP BC
DAC4 C9                   RET
DAC5
DAC5          ;*******************************************************************************
DAC5          ;PRFPBUF - "PRINT" A NUMBER (ON FPCS) TO PRNBUFF IN "RAW" STATE. (NO ROUNDING
DAC5          ;OR LEADING ZEROS, NO E+/-, ETC.)
DAC5          ;EXIT: (9-DIGITS)=SIGNIF DIGS IN PRNBUFF. EPOWER=POWER OF 10 USED IF EFORM
DAC5          ;NO DECIMAL PT IF EFORM.
DAC5          ;LEADING MINUS IF -VE, ALWAYS 1 LEADING ZERO.
DAC5          ;E.G. -0.123 OR 01234.5 OR 01.2345
DAC5
DAC5 219D5B   PRFPBUF:    LD HL,DIGITS
DAC8 360A                 LD (HL),10         ;DIGITS ALLOWED
DACA 23                   INC HL
DACB AF                   XOR A
DACC 77                   LD (HL),A          ;POWER=0 "NOT EFORMAT"
DACD 23                   INC HL
DACE 77                   LD (HL),A          ;"NO DECIMAL PT USED YET"
DACF 23                   INC HL
DAD0 229B5B               LD (NPRPOS),HL     ;PRINT POSN=BUFFER START
DAD3
DAD3 EF                    DB CALC
DAD4 31                    DB RESTACK
DAD5 07                    DB DROP
DAD6 33                    DB EXIT           ;DE=DROPPED NUMBER
DAD7
DAD7 210500                LD HL,5
DADA 19                    ADD HL,DE
DADB
DADB EB                    EX DE,HL          ;HL=NUMBER, DE=OLD STKEND
DADC 23                    INC HL
DADD CB7E                  BIT 7,(HL)        ;NZ IF -VE
DADF 2B                    DEC HL
DAE0
DAE0 3E2D                  LD A,"-"
DAE2 C473DB                CALL NZ,NPRINT    ;MINUS PRINTED BEFORE -VE NUMBERS
DAE5 CD67DB                CALL NPRZERO      ;LEADING ZERO IS USEFUL FOR ROUNDING UP LATER
DAE8 7E                    LD A,(HL)
DAE9 A7                    AND A
DAEA C8                    RET Z             ;EXIT WITH "0" IF ZERO
DAEB
DAEB FE81                  CP 81H
DAED 384D                  JR C,PRBORS       ;JR IF NO BITS BEFORE BINARY POINT (<1)
DAEF
DAEF D680                  SUB 80H           ;=BITS BEFORE BINARY POINT (1-7F)
DAF1 FE1E                  CP 30
DAF3 3047                  JR NC,PRBORS      ;IF MORE THAN 29 BITS - MIGHT NOT FIT IN 9 DIG. BCD
DAF5
DAF5 23         PRMEDN:    INC HL
DAF6 56                    LD D,(HL)
DAF7 CBFA                  SET 7,D           ;TRUE NUMERIC BIT
DAF9 23                    INC HL
DAFA 5E                    LD E,(HL)
DAFB 23                    INC HL
DAFC D5                    PUSH DE
DAFD D9                    EXX
DAFE E1                    POP HL            ;MSW TO HL"
DAFF D9                    EXX
DB00 56                    LD D,(HL)
DB01 23                    INC HL
DB02 5E                    LD E,(HL)
DB03 EB                    EX DE,HL          ;LSW TO HL
DB04 CD95DB                CALL DECIMIZE     ;CONVERT "A" BITS OF HL"HL TO BCD
DB07 EB                    EX DE,HL          ;PROTECT LSW
DB08 CDB5DB                CALL PRBCD        ;PRINT BCD TO PRINT BUFFER
DB0B EB                    EX DE,HL
DB0C D8                    RET C             ;RET IF BUFFER FULL
DB0D
DB0D 7C                    LD A,H
DB0E B5                    OR L
DB0F D9                    EXX
DB10 B4                    OR H
DB11 B5                    OR L
DB12 C8                    RET Z             ;RET IF NO SIGNIF BITS LEFT
DB13
DB13            ;BITS REMAINING IN HL"HL ARE THE BITS AFTER THE BINARY POINT, EXP 80H FORM
DB13            ;EXCEPT THERE MAY BE LEADING ZERO BITS.
DB13            ;NOW PRINT HL"HL BY MULTIPLYING REPEATEDLY BY 10 TILL BUFFER FULL
DB13
DB13
DB13 CD60DB     PRFRACT:   CALL NPRPNT       ;"."
DB16 EB                    EX DE,HL
DB17 D9                    EXX
DB18 EB                    EX DE,HL          ;TRANSFER NUMBER TO DE"DE
DB19
DB19 AF         PRFRLP:    XOR A             ;START WITH CARRY OF ZERO
DB1A CD2ADB                CALL TENX         ;LE=DE*10+A
DB1D 55                    LD D,L            ;DE=DE*10. A=CY
DB1E D9                    EXX
DB1F CD2ADB                CALL TENX         ;LE=DE*10+A
DB22 55                    LD D,L            ;DE=DE*10. A=CY
DB23 D9                    EXX
DB24 CD68DB                CALL NPRINTC
DB27 30F0                  JR NC,PRFRLP      ;LOOP UNTIL BUFFER FULL
DB29
DB29 C9                    RET
DB2A
DB2A            ;LE=DE*10+A. CY IN A
DB2A
DB2A 4B         TENX       LD C,E
DB2B CD30DB                CALL TENMUL
DB2E 5D                    LD E,L
DB2F 4A                    LD C,D
DB30
DB30            ;HL=C*10+A.
DB30
DB30 69         TENMUL:    LD L,C
DB31 2600                  LD H,0
DB33 44                    LD B,H
DB34 29                    ADD HL,HL
DB35 29                    ADD HL,HL
DB36 09                    ADD HL,BC         ;*5
DB37 29                    ADD HL,HL         ;*10
DB38 4F                    LD C,A
DB39 09                    ADD HL,BC
DB3A 7C                    LD A,H            ;A=CARRY FOR NEXT TIME, L=RESULT
DB3B C9                    RET
DB3C
DB3C            ;NUMBERS LESS THAN 1 HAVE EXPONENTS OF 1-80H. EXP 80H MEANS THAT THERE ARE
DB3C            ;NO ZERO BITS AFTER THE BINARY POINT, EXP 71H MEANS THERE ARE 15 BITS, ETC.
DB3C
DB3C ED53655C   PRBORS:    LD (STKEND),DE    ;PUT NUMBER BACK ON FPCS
DB40 3007                  JR NC,PRBIGN      ;JR IF BIG
DB42
DB42 CD7FDB               CALL DECDIGN      ;GET MAX LEADING ZEROS (DECIMAL). 0 OR MORE
DB45 C609                 ADD A,9           ;GET AN INTEGER OF 8 OR 9 DIGITS
DB47 1806                 JR SHIFTDEC
DB49
DB49
DB49          ;NUMBER WITH EXP 9E-FFH (NOW 1E-7FH) - AT LEAST 9 DEC DIGITS
DB49
DB49 CD83DB   PRBIGN:     CALL DECDIGP      ;FIND MAX DIGITS BEFORE DEC PT, -1. (9 OR MORE)
DB4C D609                 SUB 9             ;0 OR MORE.
DB4E 2F                   CPL               ;-1 OR LESS. GET AN INTEGER OF 8 OR 9 DIGITS
DB4F
DB4F 3D       SHIFTDEC:   DEC A
DB50 329E5B               LD (EPOWER),A     ;..FE=E+9,FF=E+8. GAP=0. 9=E-1,10=E-2...
DB53 3C                   INC A
DB54 CDD4DB               CALL POFTEN       ;GET N1**A (SIGNED). EXIT WITH RESULT ON FPCS
DB57
DB57 CD121D               CALL FDELETE
DB5A 7E                   LD A,(HL)         ;A=EXP OF DELETED RESULT
DB5B D680                 SUB 80H
DB5D C3F5DA               JP PRMEDN         ;HL PTS TO DROPPED NUMBER (NOW LARGE INTEGER)
DB60
DB60 3E2E     NPRPNT:     LD A,"."
DB62 329F5B               LD (DECPNTED),A   ;SHOW NON-INTEGER
DB65 180C                 JR NPRINT
DB67
DB67 AF       NPRZERO:    XOR A
DB68
DB68          ;PRINT "A" AND DEC "DIGITS TO COME". CY IF BUFFER FULL (CHAR STILL ENTERED, THO)
DB68
DB68 C630     NPRINTC:    ADD A,30H
DB6A E5                   PUSH HL
DB6B 219D5B               LD HL,DIGITS
DB6E 35                   DEC (HL)
DB6F 2003                 JR NZ,NPRINT2     ;JR IF SPACE OK
DB71
DB71 37                   SCF               ;CY=BUFFER FULL
DB72 21                   DB 21H            ;"JR+2"

DB73          ;THIS ENTRY FOR CHARS THAT DON"T COUNT - LIKE "-" AND "."

DB75 2A9B5B   NPRINT3:    LD HL,(NPRPOS)

DB7A 229B5B               LD (NPRPOS),HL
DB7D E1                   POP HL
DB7E C9                   RET
DB7F
DB7F          ;FIND HOW MANY DECIMAL DIGITS-1 THERE ARE IN A POWER OF TWO (MAXIMUM)
DB7F          ;ENTRY WITH A=POWER OF 2 (-VE IF ENTRY AT DECDIGN)
DB7F          ;EXIT WITH A=DECIMAL DIGITS BEFORE POINT-1 IF DECDIGP OR ZEROS AFTER
DB7F          ;PT. IF DECDIGN

DB80 3E80                 LD A,80H
DB82 91                   SUB C             ;1-80H->7F-00H

DB83 CDDA1C   DECDIGP:    CALL STACKA

DB87 27                   DB FIVELIT

DB8B 9A85                 DB 9AH,85H        ;0.30103

DB8F 07                   DB DROP

DB91 13                   INC DE
DB92 13                   INC DE
DB93 1A                   LD A,(DE)
DB94 C9                   RET

DB95          ;CONVERT A BITS IN HL"HL TO ASCI IN PRNBUFF. RESULT MAY HAVE UP TO 10 BCD DIGITS
DB95

DB96
DB96 AF                   XOR A
DB97 0605                 LD B,5
DB99 11B05B               LD DE,BCDBUFF     ;ZERO 5-BYTE BCD BUFFER.

DB9C 12       ZBCDBLP:    LD (DE),A
DB9D 13                   INC DE
DB9E 10FC                 DJNZ ZBCDBLP

DBA8 0605                 LD B,5

DBAC                                        ;FOR LATER BYTES, ADD IN CY FROM PREVIOUS DAA
DBAC 27                   DAA

DBAE 1B                   DEC DE
DBAF 10F9                 DJNZ DECIMBLP
DBB1

DBB2 20EC                   JR NZ,DECIMCLP    ;SHIFT C BITS
DBB4
DBB4 C9                     RET
DBB5
DBB5            ;PRINT CONTENTS OF 10-DIGIT BCD BUFFER TO PRINT BUFFER AS ASCII.
DBB5            ;EXITS IF ALL BCD DIGITS USED (NC), OR, IF PRINT BUFFER IS PART-FILLED ON ENTRY,
DBB5            ;WHEN DIGIT COUNT REACHES 00 (CY)
DBB5            ;USES HL,BC,AF
DBB5
DBB5 0E01       PRBCD:      LD C,1            ;NZ C SIGNALS "LEADING ZEROS - IGNORE"
DBB7 3E0F                   LD A,0FH          ;CLEAR LHS OF A, AND MARK RHS WITH NON-BCD DIGIT
DBB9
DBB9 0605       BCDDIG:     LD B,5            ;BCD ROTATE OF 5 BYTES
DBBB 21B45B                 LD HL,BCDBUFF+4
DBBE
DBBE ED6F       BCDROTL:    RLD               ;RHS NIBBLE OF (HL) TO A, LHS NIBBLE TO RHS,
DBC0                                          ;RHS NIBBLE OF A TO RHS OF (HL)
DBC0 2B                     DEC HL
DBC1 10FB                   DJNZ BCDROTL
DBC3
DBC3 2003                   JR NZ,PRDIGIT     ;JR IF LAST RLD GAVE A REG A NZ DIGIT
DBC5
DBC5 B1                     OR C              ;NZ IF "LEADING ZERO" STATUS
DBC6 20F1                   JR NZ,BCDDIG      ;IGNORE ANY. ELSE A=0 FOR NON-LEADING ZERO
DBC8
DBC8 48         PRDIGIT:    LD C,B            ;C=0 - NO LEADING ZEROS NOW
DBC9 E60F                   AND 0FH
DBCB FE0A                   CP 0AH
DBCD D0                     RET NC            ;RET IF TERMINATOR HIT
DBCE
DBCE CD68DB                 CALL NPRINTC
DBD1 30E6                   JR NC,BCDDIG       ;LOOP UNTIL DIGIT COUNT SHOWS FULL
DBD3
DBD3 C9                     RET
DBD4
DBD4            ;POWER-OF-TEN. MULT. TOP OF FPCS BY 10**"A" REG. WORKS WITH -VE POWERS (A>80H)
DBD4
DBD4 4F         POFTEN:     LD C,A            ;BIT 7, C=1 IF -VE POWER
DBD5 CB79                   BIT 7,C
DBD7 2802                   JR Z,POF10L1
DBD9
DBD9 ED44                   NEG
DBDB
DBDB 47         POF10L1:    LD B,A            ;B=ABSOLUTE POWER (CORRUPTS!) BC IS SAVED BY SAM
DBDC                                          ;FPCS
DBDC EF                     DB CALC
DBDD EC                     DB STKTEN         ;N1,10 (CURRENT POWER. CALL IT P)
DBDE 33                     DB EXIT
DBDF
DBDF 1804                   JR POF10LPE       ;JUMP INTO THE LOOP
DBE1
DBE1 EF         POF10LP:    DB CALC
DBE2 25                     DB DUP            ;N1*P,P,P
DBE3 00                     DB MULT           ;N1*P,P*P. DOUBLE POWER (WE ARE MOVING MORE SIGNIF
DBE4                                          ;BITS RIGHT IN B)
DBE4 33                     DB EXIT
DBE5
DBE5 CB38       POF10LPE:   SRL B
DBE7 3010                   JR NC,POF10L3     ;JR IF NO MULT/DIV ON THIS BIT
DBE9
DBE9 CB79                   BIT 7,C
DBEB 2007                   JR NZ,POF10L2     ;JR IF -VE POWER - USE DIV
DBED
DBED EF                     DB CALC
DBEE D0                     DB STO0           ;N1,P
DBEF 00                     DB MULT           ;N1*P
DBF0 D8                     DB RCL0           ;N1*P,P
DBF1 33                     DB EXIT
DBF2
DBF2 1805                   JR POF10L3
DBF4
DBF4 EF         POF10L2:    DB CALC
DBF5 D0                     DB STO0           ;N1,P
DBF6 05                     DB DIVN           ;N1/P
DBF7 D8                     DB RCL0           ;N1/P,P
DBF8 33                     DB EXIT
DBF9
DBF9 04         POF10L3:    INC B
DBFA 10E5                   DJNZ POF10LP      ;JUMP IF B NOT SHIFTED TO ZERO YET

DBFC 22655C                 LD (STKEND),HL    ;HL PTS TO LAST VALUE (HL IS SET BY "EXIT")
DBFF C9                     RET               ;DELETE LAST POWER, LEAVE N1**A ON FPCS

DDDA               ;        DB PRQUERY-CCPT-3     ;3 CLS?
DDDA                  ;     DB PRQUERY-CCPT-4     ;4
DDDA                   ;    DB PRQUERY-CCPT-5     ;5
DDDA 12                    DB PRCOMMA-CCPTB       ;6 PRINT COMMA
DDDB 40                    DB PRQUERY-CCPTB-1     ;7 (EDIT)
DDDC 43                    DB CURLF-CCPTB-2       ;8 CURSOR LEFT
DDDD 64                    DB CURRT-CCPTB-3       ;9 CURSOR RIGHT
DDDE BA                    DB CURDN-CCPTB-4       ;10 CURSOR DOWN
DDDF 58                    DB CURUP-CCPTB-5       ;11 CURSOR UP
DDE0 70                    DB PRDELL-CCPTB-6      ;12 DELETE LEFT
DDE1 C1                    DB PRENTER-CCPTB-7     ;13 ENTER
DDE2 92                    DB PRDELR-CCPTB-8      ;14 DELETE RIGHT
DDE3 38                    DB PRQUERY-CCPTB-9     ;15
DDE4 F7                    DB CC1OP-CCPTB-10      ;16 INK
DDE5 F6                    DB CC1OP-CCPTB-11      ;17 PAPER
DDE6 F5                    DB CC1OP-CCPTB-12      ;18 FLASH
DDE7 F4                    DB CC1OP-CCPTB-13      ;19 BRIGHT
DDE8 F3                    DB CC1OP-CCPTB-14      ;20 INVERSE
DDE9 F2                    DB CC1OP-CCPTB-15      ;21 OVER
DDEA F6                    DB CC2OPS-CCPTB-16     ;22 AT
DDEB F5                    DB CC2OPS-CCPTB-17     ;23 TAB
DDEC
DDEC          ;*******************************************************************************
DDEC          ;D=LINE, E=COL
DDEC
DDEC 7B       PRCOMMA:     LD A,E            ;COL
DDED 21575A                LD HL,WINDLHS
DDF0 96                    SUB (HL)          ;A=DIST FROM WIND LHS
DDF1 F5                    PUSH AF
DDF2 3A2F5A                LD A,(TABVAR)
DDF5 A7                    AND A
DDF6 0110F0                LD BC,0F010H      ;FOR 16-COLUMN TAB
DDF9 2803                  JR Z,PCOM2
DDFB
DDFB 0108F8                LD BC,0F808H      ;FOR 8-COLUMN TAB

DDFE 3A565A   PCOM2:       LD A,(WINDRHS)
DE01 BB                    CP E
DE02 3813                  JR C,PC25         ;JR IF LINE FULL
DE04

DE05 A0                    AND B             ;GET DIST DIV 16 OR DIV 8
DE06 81                    ADD A,C           ;ADD 16 OR 8
DE07 86                    ADD A,(HL)        ;ABS DESIRED COLUMN
DE08 2B                    DEC HL            ;PT TO RHS
DE09 BE                    CP (HL)
DE0A 3802                  JR C,PCOM3        ;JR IF NEW POSN WOULD NOT REACH RHS MAX
DE0C
DE0C 7E                    LD A,(HL)
DE0D 3C                    INC A
DE0E
DE0E 93       PCOM3:       SUB E
DE0F
DE0F C8       OPAORZ:      RET Z

DE70 79                   LD A,C

DE98 D5       CURDN:      PUSH DE           ;SAVE COL.

DEA9 3A595A               LD A,(WINDBOT)

DEDB                  ;    JP (HL)

DF05 380B                 JR C,TAB2         ;JR IF LINE FULL

DF11 93                   SUB E

DF12 A7         TAB2:       AND A

DF17 5C                     LD E,H            ;D=1ST OPERAND (ROW), E=2ND (COLUMN)
DF18 21575A                 LD HL,WINDLHS
DF1B 7E                     LD A,(HL)
DF1C 83                     ADD A,E           ;ADD COL
DF1D 5F                     LD E,A            ;ABS SCREEN COL
DF1E 2B                     DEC HL
DF1F 7E                     LD A,(HL)         ;WINDRHS
DF20 BB                     CP E
DF21 3821                   JR C,PATER        ;ERROR IF TOO FAR RIGHT
DF23
DF23 23                     INC HL            ;WINDLHS
DF24 23                     INC HL            ;WINDTOP
DF25 7E                     LD A,(HL)
DF26 82                     ADD A,D           ;ABS SCREEN ROW
DF27 57                     LD D,A
DF28 23                     INC HL
DF29 7E                     LD A,(HL)         ;WINDBOT
DF2A 92                     SUB D
DF2B 3013                   JR NC,POSTORH     ;JR IF 'AT' NOT OFF BOTTOM
DF2D
DF2D ED44                   NEG
DF2F 47                     LD B,A            ;NUMBER OF EXTRA ROWS NEEDED IN LS
DF30 3A735A                 LD A,(DEVICE)
DF33 A7                     AND A
DF34 280E                   JR Z,PATER        ;ERROR IF UPPER SCREEN, BUT LS CAN INCREASE SIZE
DF36
DF36 56                     LD D,(HL)
DF37 D5                     PUSH DE           ;D=WINDBOT, E=ABS 'AT' COLUMN
DF38
DF38 C5         SLSLP:      PUSH BC
DF39 CDB8DF                 CALL SCRLS
DF3C C1                     POP BC
DF3D 10F9                   DJNZ SLSLP        ;SCROLL LS UP 'B' TIMES TILL POSN IS ON RIGHT ROW
DF3F                                          ;(I.E. ADD ROWS TO TOP OF LOWER SCREEN)
DF3F D1                     POP DE

DF46            ;SAVE CURRENT O/P ADDR

DF4B 56                     LD D,(HL)
DF4C ED53B55A               LD (OPSTORE),DE
DF50 C9                     RET

DF68

DF6E

DF71 3ABB5A                 LD A,(SPROMPT)
DF74 A7                     AND A

DF77

DF80 CDE0DF                 CALL SVTEMPS      ;SAVE TEMPORARY ATTRIBUTES ETC
DF83 2A515C                 LD HL,(CURCHL)
DF86 E5                     PUSH HL           ;PROBABLY CHANNEL 'S'

DF89 3E01                   LD A,1            ;'Scroll?'

DF94

DF9B CA610E                 JP Z,BRCERR
DF9E

DF9F 22515C                 LD (CURCHL),HL
DFA2 CD7011                 CALL CHANFLAG
DFA5 CDDEDF                 CALL RSTTEMPS     ;RESTORE TEMPORARY ATTRIBUTES
DFA8 CDAC11                 CALL COLEX
DFAB
DFAB C3950B     DOSCRL:     JP EDRS1UP
DFAE
DFAE 2A585A     SETSCRCT:   LD HL,(WINDTOP)
DFB1 7C                     LD A,H
DFB2 95                     SUB L
DFB3 3C                     INC A             ;A=WINDOW HEIGHT
DFB4 328C5C                 LD (SCRCT),A
DFB7 C9                     RET
DFB8
DFB8
DFB8            ;SCROLL LOWER SCREEN. IF THE TOP OF THE LOWER SCREEN HITS UPPER SCREEN PRINT
DFB8            ;POSN THEN THE UPPER SCREEN HAS TO BE SCROLLED AS WELL, FROM TOP TO PRINT POSN
DFB8
DFB8 213E5A     SCRLS:      LD HL,LWTOP
DFBB 7E                     LD A,(HL)         ;LS TOP WILL MOVE UP BY ONE LINE
DFBC 3D                     DEC A
DFBD 2885                   JR Z,PATER        ;OFF SCREEN ERROR IF WINDOW HIT SCREEN TOP
DFBF
DFBF 77                     LD (HL),A         ;NEW LWTOP
DFC0 32585A                 LD (WINDTOP),A    ;ALSO RECORD NEW TOP FOR CURRENT (TEMP) WINDOW (LS)
DFC3 21C35A                 LD HL,KPOS+1
DFC6 35                     DEC (HL)          ;CURSOR LINE KEPT UP-TO-DATE
DFC7 216D5A                 LD HL,SPOSNU+1
DFCA BE                     CP (HL)
DFCB 20DE                   JR NZ,DOSCRL      ;JR IF NO CLASH WITH UPPER SCREEN PRINT POSN
DFCD                                          ;(JR ALSO IF WINDTOP IS ABOVE US PRINT POSN - SIC)
DFCD F5                     PUSH AF
DFCE 35                     DEC (HL)          ;US PRINT POSN MOVES UP ONE LINE
DFCF CD5E11                 CALL STREAMFE     ;MAIN WINDOW
DFD2 F1                     POP AF
DFD3 32595A                 LD (WINDBOT),A    ;WIND BOT=FORMER PRINT POSN
DFD6 CD950B                 CALL EDRS1UP      ;SCROLL MAIN WINDOW UP ONE
DFD9 CD6111                 CALL STREAMFD     ;LOWER WINDOW
DFDC 18CD                   JR DOSCRL         ;SCROLL LS
DFDE

DFDF 26                     DB 26H            ;'JR +1'
DFE0
DFE0 37         SVTEMPS:    SCF

DFE7 3801                   JR C,SVRSTTMPS

E019
E019                       INCLUDE TAPEMN.SAM     ;SAVE, LOAD, MERGE, VERIFY
E019            ;TAPEMN.SAM - SAVE/LOAD/MERGE/VERIFY CONTROL
E019            ;SYNTAX CHECK FOR ALL TAPE COMMANDS STARTS AT SLMVC
E019
E019            ;THERE ARE 2 BUFFERS - HDR (HEADER - REQUESTED) AND HDL (HEADER - LOADED)
E019            ;HEADER BUFFER FORMAT:
E019
E019          ;0        - TYPE (16=BAS, 17=NUM ARRAY, 18=STR ARRAY, 19=CODE, 20=SCREEN$)
E019          ;1-10     - (10) FILE NAME, PADDED WITH SPACES IF NEEDED
E019          ;11-14    - (4) ALLOWS LONGER FILE NAME IF SLDEV<>T
E019          ;15       - (1) FLAGS. BIT 0=INVIS. NAME, BIT 1=PROTECTED CODE
E019          ;16-26    - (11) IF TYPE 17 OR 18=ARRAY/STRING TLBYTE/NAME (11)
E019          ;16              IF TYPE 20     =SCREEN MODE
E019          ;16-18           IF TYPE 16     =PROG LEN EXCLUDING VARS (3)
E019          ;19-21           IF TYPE 16     =PROG LEN PLUS NVARS, EXCLUDING GAP AND SAVARS (3)
E019          ;22-24           IF TYPE 16     =PROG LEN PLUS NVARS, EXCLUDING SAVARS (3)
E019          ;27         (1) DIRE - DIRECTORY ENTRY NUMBER (HDR ONLY) NOT USED
E019          ;28-30    - (4) SPARE
E019
E019          ;DISP OF HDN FROM BUFFER START:
E019
E019          ;31-33    - (3)   REL PAGE FORM START ADDR IF CODE, ACTUAL ADDR IF PROG OR DATA.
E019          ;                 (OR FFXXXX IF ARRAY DOESN'T EXIST)
E019          ;34-36    - (3)   DATA LENGTH (PAGEFORM) OR FFFFFF IF E.G. LOAD "" CODE
E019          ;                 PROG+VARS LENGTH, OR ARRAY LEN (OR FFXXXX IF NON-EXISTENT)
E019          ;37-39    - (3)   EXECUTE ADDR. IF CODE, REL PAGE FORM, OR FFXXXX IF NO EXEC.
E019          ;                 IF BAS AND NO AUTO-RUN, FIRST BYTE=FF, ELSE FIRST=0 AND THE
E019          ;                 AUTO-RUN LINE NUMBER IS IN THE NEXT TWO BYTES.
E019
E019          ;40-79            COMMENT. NOT INITIALISED - CAN BE POKED, PEEKED.
E019
E019          ;SAVE, LOAD, VERIFY, MERGE ALL ENTER HERE
E019
E019 D6A6     SLMVC:      SUB 0A6H           ;OVERTOK
E01B 32B95B               LD (OVERF),A
E01E 2001                 JR NZ,NOVE
E020
E020 E7                   RST 20H            ;SKIP "OVER"
E021
E021 2A065A   NOVE:       LD HL,(PSLD)
E024 22B75B               LD (SLDEV),HL      ;PERM DEVICE TO TEMP
E027 CDA13A               CALL EXPTSTR       ;NAME
E02A 3045                 JR NC,HDR2         ;JR IF NOT RUNNING
E02C
E02C 21014B               LD HL,HDR+1        ;HEADER BUFFER ADDR
E02F 0619                 LD B,25
E031
E031 3620     HDCLP:      LD (HL),20H        ;CLEAR NAMES AREAS WITH SPACES
E033 23                   INC HL
E034 10FB                 DJNZ HDCLP
E036
E036 060E                 LD B,14
E038
E038 36FF     HDCLP2:     LD (HL),0FFH       ;CLEAR REST WITH FFH
E03A 23                   INC HL
E03B 10FB                 DJNZ HDCLP2
E03D
E03D CDEA3E               CALL SBFSR         ;BC=NAME LEN, DE=START, IN SYS PAGE BUFFER **
E040 260B                 LD H,NMLEN+1
E042 CD26E5               CALL TCHK
E045 2802                 JR Z,NLTP
E047
E047 260F                 LD H,NMLEN+5       ;ALLOW EXTRA CHARS IF NON-T
E049
E049 79       NLTP:       LD A,C
E04A BC                   CP H
E04B 300F                 JR NC,IFNER        ;LIMIT NAME LEN
E04D
E04D 21014B               LD HL,HDR+1        ;DEST FOR FIRST NAME CHAR
E050 36FF                 LD (HL),0FFH       ;ASSUME NAME IS NULL
E052 A7                   AND A
E053 3A745B               LD A,(CURCMD)
E056 2006                 JR NZ,TNMOK        ;JR IF NAME LEN IS 1-MAX CHARS LONG
E058
E058 FE94                 CP SAVETOK
E05A 2015                 JR NZ,HDR2         ;JR IF NOT SAVE (WITH A NULL NAME)
E05C
E05C CF       IFNER:      RST 08H
E05D 12                   DB 18              ;'Invalid file name'
E05E
E05E FE94     TNMOK:      CP SAVETOK
E060 200C                 JR NZ,MVTNM
E062

E877            ;HEAP ROOM
E877            ;ENTRY: BC=BYTES TO RESERVE (IF +VE) OR BYTES TO RELEASE (IF -VE)
E877            ;EXIT: DE=OLD HEAPEND (ROOM START). RELEASE OF >=HEAP SIZE MAKES IT EMPTY.
E877            ;E.G. LD BC,0C000H:CALL HEAPRM WILL MAKE HEAP MT.
E877            ;HL=NEW HEAPEND (ROOM+1). CAN BE CALLED WITH BC=0. NC INDICATES NOT ENOUGH
E877            ;ROOM. (HL=DEGREE OF OVERFLOW, 0+ BYTES). BC IS PRESERVED.

EA38          ;DRAW TO X,Y,Z. MEM0 HOLDS Z, REGS HOLD FIDDLED COORDS (NOW DISPLACEMENTS).

ED39            ;UPACK - CALLED BY INITIALIZATION ROUTINE
ED39            ;UPACK CHARSET FROM 5-BIT TO 8-BIT WITH 2 ZEROS AT LHS, 1 AT RHS. MAKE BOTTOM
ED39            ;SCAN ZERO EXCEPT IN 13 CASES DEALT WITH SEPARATELY.
ED39            ;CHAR DEFS. THIS ROUTINE TAKES 101 BYTES, WHEREAS A NORMAL LDIR WOULD TAKE 11.
ED39            ;NET GAIN: 402 BYTES (NOTE:OUT OF DATE NOW FOREIGN SET DROPPED!)
ED39
ED39 210763     UPACK:     LD HL,99*256+7    ;H COUNTS 99 CHARS, L COUNTS 7 BYTES/CHAR
ED3C D9                    EXX
ED3D 214EFE                LD HL,CHARSRC
ED40 119051                LD DE,CHARSVAL

ED44 0605                  LD B,5            ;5 BITS TO UNPACK
ED46
ED46 4E         UPKGC:     LD C,(HL)
ED47 23                    INC HL
ED48 37                    SCF               ;AFTER FIRST PASS, C ROTATES IN NC. WHEN C=0, LAST
ED49                                       ;VALID DATA BIT HAS GONE, CY=JUNK (SET)
ED49 CB11     UPKBL:     RL C
ED4B 28F9                JR Z,UPKGC        ;GET NEXT DATA BYTE IF C USED UP
ED4D
ED4D 17                  RLA
ED4E 10F9                DJNZ UPKBL        ;GET 5 BITS IN 'A' REG
ED50
ED50 07                  RLCA              ;CENTRE DATA.
ED51 12                  LD (DE),A
ED52 13                  INC DE
ED53 AF                  XOR A             ;NC, A=0
ED54 0605                LD B,5            ;GET 5 BITS
ED56 D9                  EXX
ED57 2D                  DEC L
ED58 D9                  EXX
ED59 20EE                JR NZ,UPKBL       ;LOOP FOR 7 BYTES/CHAR
ED5B
ED5B 12                  LD (DE),A         ;8TH BYTE IS ZERO
ED5C 13                  INC DE
ED5D
ED5D D9                  EXX
ED5E 2E07                LD L,7
ED60 25                  DEC H
ED61 D9                  EXX
ED62 20E5                JR NZ,UPKBL       ;LOOP FOR 137 CHARS

ED9F
ED9F          ;COLOUR.SAM
ED9F          ;E.G. PALETTE I,C
ED9F          ;     PALETTE I,B,C
ED9F          ;     PALETTE I,C LINE L or COLOUR I,B,C LINE L
ED9F          ;     PALETTE I LINE L=DELETE CHANGE OF I AT LINE L
ED9F          ;     PALETTE   CLEARS ALL INTERRUPT CHANGES, RE-INITS PAL MEMORIES
ED9F
ED9F          ;I=LOGICAL INK NUMBER (PALETTE MEMORY) 0-15.
ED9F          ;C IS A COLOUR NUMBER FROM 0-127. B AND C ARE 2 SUCH COLOURS TO ALTERNATE UNDER
ED9F          ;INTERRUPT CONTROL. VALUES ARE SIMPLY ENTERED INTO TWO TABLES USED BY THE
ED9F          ;FRAME INTERRUPT TO SET UP THE PALETTE 50 TIMES/SEC. IF TABLES MATCH, NO
ED9F          ;INKS FLASH, OTHERWISE FLASH HAPPENS AFTER (SPEEDINK) INTS.
ED9F          ;IF 'LINE L' IS USED, THE COLOUR(S) WILL ONLY BE SET FROM START OF SPECIFIED
ED9F          ;SCAN LINE (ACTUALLY RHS BORDER OF PRECEDING LINE). LINE CAN BE 174 TO -16.
ED9F          ;=SCANS 1-191. GIVES INT AT SCANS 0-190 (ACTUALLY END OF PRECEDING LINE), AND
ED9F          ;COLOUR CHANGE AT SCANS 1-191
ED9F          ;UP TO 127 CHANGES CAN BE MADE PER SCREEN
ED9F
ED9F CD7A3A   COLOUR:      CALL CRCOLON
EDA2 2031                  JR NZ,COLOUR1               ;JR UNLESS JUST 'PALETTE'

F8C8            ;ON POWER-UP. UDGS SYS VAR PTS TO USR "A". TAKES 328 BYTES OF RAM. OVERLAP WITH
F8C8            ;COMMAND TOKENS USES CONTEXT TO AVOID PROBLEMS - PRINT CHR$ 160 GIVES UDG, LIST
F8C8            ;COMMAND GIVES KEYWORD. QUOTES FORCES UDGS.

FC69            ;SHIFTED STATES. EACH ROW CORRESPONDS TO A BIT ON THE PORT (BIT 7 AT TOP) AND
FC69            ;EACH COLUMN TO A PORT MSB. CAPS SHIFT (BIT 0,PORT FE) SCANNED SEPARATELY, AS
FC69            ;IS SYM SHIFT (BIT 1,PORT 7F) AND CONTROL (BIT 0,PORT FF)
FC69
FC69            ;PORT MSB:      FF 7F BF DF EF F7 FB FD FE
FC69            ;BIT MAP BYTE 8     7   6   5   4   3    2  1   0

FC69            ;252 DEFINED AS CHR$ 6
